request_payload.exposure_text: As a former civil defense coordinator, I've seen firsthand how underfunded preparedness programs put communities at risk. Don't let politicians tell you 'it can't happen here' - we need robust civil defense funding NOW. #NationalSecurity #PreparednessMatters
